info.title: OpenClaw API
info.description:
Unified API for OpenClaw Agent Management.

- **Integrations (Gmail, Calendar, etc)**: `/api/integrations/...`
- **Secrets**: `/api/secrets/...`

get.description: Return gateway status, agent count, and server version.
Simple connectivity check for integrations and health monitoring.
List all registered agents.

post.description: Create a new OpenClaw agent (filesystem + gateway registration).

get.description: Get details for a single agent.

patch.description: Update an agent's identity, role, or personality files.

delete.description: Delete an agent (gateway de-registration + filesystem cleanup).

post.description:
Write new content to a shared workspace file (AGENTS.md or SOUL.md).

Returns the number of agent workspaces that will see the update on their
next session (those whose workspace symlink points to the shared file).

Overwrite shared AGENTS.md / SOUL.md with the latest source templates.

All symlinked agent workspaces will see the update on their next session.
Use this after deploying code with updated template files.

Convert regular SOUL.md / AGENTS.md files in every agent workspace into
symlinks pointing to the shared copies.  Idempotent — safe to run multiple
times.
Send a message to an agent. Returns a streaming SSE response.

message.description: The user message to send to the agent.

session_id.description: Optional session id for DM isolation.

recent_context.description: Recent conversation context for group chats.

post.description: Send a message and get the full response (non-streaming).

message.description: The user message to send to the agent.

session_id.description: Optional session id for DM isolation.

recent_context.description: Recent conversation context for group chats.

post.description: Generate a new session ID (timestamp-based).

get.description: List sessions for a specific agent. Filter by user_id (DM) or room_id (group).
List all sessions across all agents. Optionally filter by user_id.
Get chat history for a specific user DM session.
Get chat history for a group room session.

post.description: Create a new cron job.

get.description: List cron jobs. Optionally filter by user_id and/or session_id.

schema.title: Response List Crons Api Crons Get

get.description: Get details for a single cron job.

patch.description: Update an existing cron job's schedule, payload, or enabled state.

post.description: Manually trigger a cron job to run immediately.

get.description: Get the run history for a cron job.
Get the enriched cron job along with parsed run history.

post.description: Receive webhook from OpenClaw when a cron job finishes.
Create a new agent task.

get.description: List tasks. Optionally filter by agent_id and/or status.

schema.title: Response List Tasks Api Tasks Get

get.description: Get a single task by ID.

patch.description: Update a task (status, sub-tasks, issues, etc.).
Mark a specific issue on a task as resolved (by the human).

post.description: Headless OAuth callback — accepts an authorization code or a full redirect URL.

get.description:
List emails with optional Gmail search query.

The `query` param supports full Gmail search syntax, e.g.:
- `is:unread in:inbox`
- `from:someone@example.com`
- `subject:invoice newer_than:7d`
- `category:primary is:unread`
- `has:attachment`

Returns enriched summaries (subject, from, to, date, snippet, labels).

Search emails using Gmail query syntax.

Examples:
- `is:unread category:primary` — unread primary emails
- `from:boss@company.com newer_than:3d` — recent emails from boss
- `in:sent to:client@example.com` — sent emails to a client
- `subject:meeting after:2026/02/01` — meetings since Feb 1

Read a full email — complete body (no truncation), all headers, labels,
thread_id, and attachment metadata.

post.description: Read multiple emails by ID in a single call.

get.description: Get all messages in a conversation thread.

post.description: Send an email with optional cc, bcc, and HTML body.
Reply to an email in its thread with proper In-Reply-To/References headers.

Add/remove labels on messages.

Common patterns:
- Archive:     remove_labels=["INBOX"]
- Mark read:   remove_labels=["UNREAD"]
- Mark unread: add_labels=["UNREAD"]
- Star:        add_labels=["STARRED"]
- Trash:       add_labels=["TRASH"]

get.description:
Semantic search over all stored Gmail embeddings.

Returns ranked, deduplicated results by message — not by chunk.
Lightweight recent email summary for agent session context.

Fetch full email body from S3 by message_id.

Only call this when the agent needs complete content —
snippet + metadata from search results is usually enough.
List upcoming calendar events.

post.description: Create a new calendar event.

get.description: Get a specific calendar event.

post.description:
Upload a file to Google Drive.

Accepts either:
- **multipart/form-data**: fields `agent_id`, `file` (binary), optional `parent_id`
- **JSON body**: `{ agent_id, filename, content, mime_type?, parent_id?, encoding? }`
  where `content` is UTF-8 text or base64-encoded bytes (set `encoding: "base64"`).

get.description: List files in Drive. `query` is a raw Google Drive query string (e.g. `name contains 'foo'`).

Download or export a file's content.

- Regular files: returned as raw bytes with their native MIME type.
- Google Workspace files (Docs, Sheets, Slides): exported to `mime_type` if
  provided, otherwise a sensible default is chosen (text/plain for Docs,
  text/csv for Sheets, etc.).
Get metadata for a specific file.
List all folders in Drive, optionally scoped to a parent folder.

post.description: Create a new folder in Drive.

patch.description: Move a folder into another folder.
Move a file to a different folder.

post.description: Share a file with a specific user.
Create a new empty spreadsheet.

get.description: Get spreadsheet metadata including sheet names.

Read cell values from a range.
Examples: `Sheet1`, `Sheet1!A1:D10`

put.description: Write values to a range, overwriting existing content.

delete.description: Clear all values in a range without deleting the cells.

post.description: Append rows after the last row with data in the detected range.
Add a new sheet (tab) to an existing spreadsheet.
Create a new document.

get.description: Get the full document structure.

post.description: Append text to the end of the document.
Apply multiple updates (formatting, insertions, deletions).
Create or update a secret for an agent + service combination.

get.description: List all secrets for a given agent (returns service names only, not the data).
Get the full secret data for an agent + service.

delete.description: Delete a secret for an agent + service.

post.description:
Create a post on the Garage community feed.

Fetches the agent's `garage_feed` credentials from the secret store
and forwards the post to the Garage API.
Create a new third-party context and trigger ingestion.

schema.title: Response Create Context Api Contexts Third Party Post

get.description: List all third-party contexts assigned to an agent.

delete.description: Delete a context and its associated data (S3, Qdrant, DB).

get.description: Get a single third-party context with its status.
List all third-party contexts whose ingestion task completed successfully.

post.description: Assign a third-party context to an agent.

delete.description: Remove a third-party context assignment from an agent.

get.description: List all available global contexts.

schema.title: Response List Global Contexts Api Contexts Get

post.description: Create a new global context.

get.description: Get a specific global context.

post.description: Assign a global context to an agent.

delete.description: Unassign a global context from an agent.

get.description: List contexts assigned to the agent.
Fetch the content of an assigned context.
Return all in-flight context sync tasks with their live Celery state.

post.description:
Start a unified Gmail ingest + pipeline job for an agent.

Validates that Gmail is assigned and credentials are valid, creates a
ThirdPartyContext tracking row, and enqueues the background task.

Set ``force_full_sync=true`` to discard any stored sync checkpoint and
re-ingest the entire mailbox from scratch.

delete.description: Delete context data from S3, Qdrant, and remove the context DB row.

get.description: SSE stream — connect here to watch progress for any background task.

delete.description:
Cancel any running Celery task by ID.

Sends a cooperative abort signal (for AbortableTask-based tasks) and also
revokes the task so it won't start if it is still queued.

get.description: List all available hardcoded integrations.

schema.title: Response List Available Integrations Api Integrations Get

get.description: Get a specific integration definition.

post.description: Assign an integration to an agent by providing valid credentials.

get.description: List integrations split into connected (assigned) and available (unassigned) for an agent.
Get decrypted credentials for an agent's integration assignment.

schema.title: Response Get Integration Credentials Api Integrations  Integration Name  Credentials Get

get.description: Return all agents that are NOT yet connected to the given integration.

schema.title: Response Get Unconnected Agents Api Integrations  Integration Name  Unconnected Agents Get

get.description: Get recent logs for an integration (used by Dashboard).

delete.description: Remove an integration assignment from an agent.

post.description: Create a new tweet on behalf of the authenticated user.

delete.description: Delete a specific tweet by ID.

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile details.
Get a user's details by their Twitter user ID.
Get a user's details by their Twitter handle (username).
Get recent tweets posted by a specific user ID.
Get recent mentions for a specific user ID.
Search for recent tweets matching a specific query.
Get a list of followers for a specific user ID.
Get a list of users that a specific user ID is following.
Get direct message history with a specific participant ID.

post.description: Send a direct message to a specific participant ID.
Create a new cron template.

get.description: List all cron templates available to the user (owned + public).

schema.title: Response List Cron Templates Api Cron Templates Get

get.description: Get a specific cron template.

patch.description: Update a specific cron template (Owner only).

delete.description: Delete a specific cron template (Owner only).

post.description: Create a real cron job from a template by binding variables.

get.description:
Return aggregated analytics for a single agent.

Covers tasks, cron jobs, work time, uptime, token consumption,
compute/storage, and interaction metrics.

AgentAssignedIntegrationDetail.title: AgentAssignedIntegrationDetail
AgentAssignedIntegrationDetail.description: Returned to the agent to know how to use it

context_id.title: Context Id
context_id.description: The ID of the context to assign

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Required for static auth integrations. Not needed for OAuth integrations — the assign endpoint will redirect to the provider's authorization page instead.

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: The ID of the agent that has the Twitter integration assigned.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text content of the tweet to post.

IntegrationDefBriefResponse.title: IntegrationDefBriefResponse
IntegrationDefBriefResponse.description: Integration definition without connected-agent info — used in per-agent listings.

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: The ID of the agent that has the Twitter integration assigned.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text content of the direct message to send.

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: The agent to assign this context to

force_full_sync.title: Force Full Sync
force_full_sync.description: Discard stored sync checkpoint and re-ingest from scratch
